textByHashes.7d20ec86928722e205a5cad698299d16f07b61c9: The pleasure is all mine. From today, the sun will shine on our two kingdoms once more. The mistakes of the past are now behind us.
textByHashes.e7f39e103e46ec799357b3cd5da5cce5d454b40c: I am told you were with my son when he was captured?
textByHashes.2fab624b322e66a89cf861218019f0c25cbb7752: You followed along with this plan of his, knowing that in doing so, you were supporting him in disobeying an order from his Queen?
textByHashes.2ca0836afc4fdd5edb910cb0605cb604fa5204b3: You do not strike me as a fool, so why do you play the part of one?
textByHashes.91c502b8e8c816717eec0e68b3a7965a65e4eafd: Why should I trust you? Because my son did? Tell me, which recent event was it that suggested to you that he was of sound judgement?
textByHashes.670648c9810cdf6623dd46516109b1458f43cc65: Trust is like a blade. If not maintained, it fails when you need it most.
textByHashes.86ebe7f1e13d7faaceb6a8f9acb497653ce36655: You seem to have made quite the impression, outsider. Both Servius and my son have taken a liking to you.
textByHashes.b4e5894f21f92cb70976c76017f1a9994cf2290a: Prove them right. Rectify this situation.
textByHashes.ef4c043be6a07467c7595dc0287805528318cbf0: We need to avoid outright aggression. The safety of my son cannot be risked. I understand you were able to infiltrate the Emissaries and gain access to their temple?
textByHashes.939498a0a276924125f2531800ba5b71462e6d0f: Then do so again. Gather any information you can on what they are doing with my son, then return to me here. Do not give me a reason to regret this decision.
textByHashes.c2811eb2001d94f356ce81314d110cf9f6048933: You have a job to do. Return to the Twilight Temple and uncover any information you may have missed when you were last there.
textByHashes.9f28b00380340861fb04b12e15e5d93af63f033a: You've returned. I trust that means you have news for us?
textByHashes.85dd20e7ef4c2a436251c240742772aa91d39641: What it is isn't important right now. Do not lose focus on the matter at hand. If you don't know where they took my son, then how do you intend to find out?
textByHashes.400cb28877ef4f55903ee74040ab22c0ea5322d2: Then let's not waste any time. Adventurer, I will dispatch Captain Vibia of the Knights of Varlamore to this property. You will meet her there. Secure the property with her and capture this Forebearer Janus.
textByHashes.cb5fe3c7fd2f4f9733a5634766145b29817506e4: Good. May the sun light your way.
textByHashes.172f4beee89fb5b5393fa783fa615cee6f87ecd3: Adventurer, you should head to this cultist property near the western bank. Captain Vibia will meet you there.
textByHashes.a84aee6a3217dde56326bfaa5d132c7d325b241d: Really? I've known a lot of people claim death doesn't scare them. From afar, bravery comes easy, but then the moment finally comes when they stare death in the face...
textByHashes.37b2a209249aa6c713e0b555ec3e109de88a0422: That's when they break. If you think you're the exception, you will soon be disappointed.
textByHashes.28141e7ab0a5c4a9e9a75d6777ecff16d981f7f4: Then celebrate it you will, but first, you will talk.
textByHashes.ff4f0442f8cea84501a0c9ef0c699b5189181001: It seems you were right Servius, the cultists wish to trigger the Gathering.
textByHashes.f7a0e891c924e69d9e397dcb509ef59251f1b4b0: According to our recently departed iknami here, it's less about the ceremony and more about its location: The Crypt of Tonali, in the Tlati Rainforest. The cult believe the crypt houses the secret path to Mokhaiotl.
textByHashes.7ffea1d63f5b1c7ad9f9c1c6045fbec81ab4c1ab: Yes, Servius mentioned this nagua you encountered. What did she say?
textByHashes.35eb02f81661378e0bc5d47cbcfc630235ffb098: Perhaps, though it matters little whether we believe her or not. The cult do believe, and they will stop at nothing to access the crypt.
textByHashes.54b6473222dbb98553db6490b39b054faead8207: The Gathering takes place behind a set of doors within the crypt. These doors can only be opened with the blood of the two Teokan.
textByHashes.958a7202ef03d0fd85ac9ad900a9045824191064: The cult are hoping to substitute Servius' blood with my son's, but it seems they are having issues in doing so. They have apparently chosen to seek help from the Dwarves of Cam Torum with this.
textByHashes.51df5b2e04e29be0b38b6a429eb1af651f2adb5e: You did well here. It seems Itzla was right to trust you.
textByHashes.698b68e359ce829c92d358c5267ed8abb533f95d: Now, we will depart at once. Are you ready to go?
textByHashes.c5f9d393ee751e08b7e7c67cca1550add307adea: Very well, but let me know if you change your mind.
textByHashes.f9bfe6a77c73d05f897aee5aaf3957210fe30330: , do you wish to travel with us to Cam Torum?
textByHashes.34645852c4ae4817403a3c16a885f578e6aee1ce: I'm afraid the suddenness of our arrival was a necessity, though I'm pleased to see that it didn't prevent you from meeting us here personally, Highlord Katlo.
textByHashes.4a825f6f8c3fa86b65ee5213559050a2db8d6bdb: Perhaps, Highlord, we should discuss the reason for our visit?
textByHashes.0db7cb4716572fcfed4f2c9c83df34c33eaf842d: We have reason to believe that enemies of Varlamore are operating within Cam Torum.
textByHashes.527118e49b4355a21afa2daced29d08ef49eecc6: They are members of the Twilight Emissaries cult. The cult wish to gain access to the Crypt of Tonali, but they require dwarven help to do so.
textByHashes.822a5b341ead54e40ed761d828354ab296665714: With respect, Highlord, these cultists are our enemy. I would ask that you let us find and deal with them personally.
textByHashes.9433dc342e45cdf7d8bc7c3bc07af4677bbb1ec5: So you've worked with the dwarves here before? You are full of surprises, .
textByHashes.a31b13948b33f576f75615de60ee9d1f4c0b006f: Clearly. Now, time is of the essence here. Use the trust you have built with the dwarves to find and stop the cultists. Once you have done so, report to me at Tal Teklan in the Tlati Rainforest.
textByHashes.dac4f074039c46f071322769a17240f5155b906c: No. My presence here will be a distraction, and I must ensure that the defences are ready at the Crypt of Tonali. However, I trust you will not let me down.
textByHashes.58397fb840d2ce745e3e20789b6c299a1141fe71: Nonsense. Need I remind you that you are still a target for the cultists? You will return to the palace.
textByHashes.2242c949c4ca7c7c3344c8a8f119489481254f64: Fine. But I will leave a bodyguard with you.
textByHashes.f685fe02ab645aa46fc9f9c6af4c777258adfcf5: No I shouldn't, and yet here we are. Now, let us get to work. Good luck to you both, and may the sun light your way.
textByHashes.fda991dc0f8bab2a285385e0235b9a075fa38710: Hold the line! We must not let them get to those doors!
textByHashes.dabf23a01d71231ad819daee3ad35b166b3f4104: Get him to safety! Ensure he's unharmed!
textByHashes.65e2af121b99c8b98df10ca5b2c8e86161ffd36a: Yes, Furia, what was it for? You betrayed your people. You betrayed your Queen. Why?
textByHashes.17d25c9faf3eab2eaf5e3dd34291897c8738e9d8: And now that future is at an end. Come quietly. Metzli has abandoned you. You have nowhere left to run.
textByHashes.cb09e2eb0792874178e3dad892b7d462186392f4: So be it. Kill them both.
textByHashes.3e550fba3c7f2cfa7b55c06a4acd475e257d637c: Itzla? What are you doing here? Why aren't you resting?
textByHashes.bb56e84525d510fa14c316af8d6c29c3a028825f: We've only just got you back, and you want me to send you after her?
textByHashes.e9d2f66f750cddcdd3ad757f11bd6fc97bef954d: , keep my fool of a son alive, would you?
textByHashes.ea58a8fe09336cf805efeb4e21c7315c797babdc: Go, the both of you, before I change my mind.
textByHashes.7b8305c1556710aaa15fdd58b9bc4b6847028aaf: Be careful down there. May the sun light your way.
textByHashes.af8203532eba4b77c5fab2d44b833f8cc1920f5f: Take her to the capital. Find a nice cell for her where she can await her fate.
textByHashes.83f74c4bb18387dca157e660a35c54626b5d8daf: My son is showing a remarkable amount of restraint and foresight. The cultists didn't replace him with an imposter, did they?
textByHashes.0267d366818a3786ee34ac4fd4b5bb77bd2c9f73: Then consider me impressed. We might make a king out of you yet.
textByHashes.2490b16865fa7b0066e7e55fb729ed375a1c8142: Now, I must return to the capital. I need to see to arrangements around a new Teokan. . Itzla. Well done. Timoiva for now, and may the sun light your way.
textByHashes.90f50220a61f3bf96f67035c24a2a679cec7b009: Nilsal, . It is good to see you.
textByHashes.ad6c98db56252b21264f9ff1d375d36d5d9cf983: Well, with the cult out of the way, we've been able to refocus on the recent opening of the kingdom. Signing the treaties was only the first step.
textByHashes.d629c5faf12ec8fdfaade9e479e7d824d21d689c: There are new opportunities for us in areas such as trade that we're still yet to fully explore.
textByHashes.9ff0d0cc46eee2fb709183a934f783b91fed3690: Then of course you have Kourend. The complicated history between our kingdoms means we are yet to sign a treaty with them, but my hope is that will change soon.
textByHashes.bf73d02f94f0645fff548558485fe91cefde6fe5: Then of course you have Kourend. The complicated history between our kingdoms means we are yet to sign a treaty with them.
textByHashes.15349e2f7ac6edb17cf97460696fce39613a853a: I was hoping to arrange one with their new king, but his reign turned out to be a rather short one. I must confess, I find the continued instability up there to be concerning.
textByHashes.5b463152a4f4034368500fa4b648dd02436e568c: We will have to see how their new king fares. He is young and inexperienced, but he may still have potential...
textByHashes.4ffe2abed8d2f8c6208c6f0c4c32dfa94e558b64: Anyway, if there's nothing else, I'm afraid I must return to my work. May the sun light your way, .
textByHashes.e089f99e76f737cdf01f474a8b73fa1419ed28c6: As I stand here, the healers toil to save the life of the Teokan of Ralos.
textByHashes.6d8c5af056d9dc0c3c3029311bf824e3e34e7b9a: Then take responsibility. You were charged with rooting out those who would plot against us. You failed. Why?
textByHashes.a9d9292662a588eeeb272aaf8688cfb207cdc4a5: So you would chase glory like it is gold to be hoarded? You are the heir to Varlamore. It is not your place.
textByHashes.241222be1d208d92d8e36902238bcefb2cc161a7: You do not lead at all, boy! You command the Knights of Varlamore. Use them!
textByHashes.01af17aa833607b6d13c71ef5d679b0f2cff8c8e: Then all the more reason that you exclude yourself. Determine who you can trust and send them on this mission of yours.
textByHashes.f792d6dcd554f300148c4c5eeca26dfe905c2766: Then you have failed as a leader.
textByHashes.3224e03f23c9aaf081534d0ab9de0fde842017e7: Now go. You have work to do. I don't expect you to fail me again.
